A Welcome from Wen

A little jewel in the hills.

Hither House is a cluster of nine cottages and studios on a quiet, hilltop property a mile outside the village of Montauk. We sit just above the Atlantic — close enough to walk barefoot to the beach, far enough that the only sound at night is the wind through the trees.

Our guests come back year after year. They bring their families, their dogs, their oldest friends. Some have been visiting since the eighties. We keep the cottages tidy, the grounds tended, and the welcome warm. The rest is up to the season.

Wen Owner & Manager

Accommodations

Choose your cottage.

From a cozy studio for two to a two-bedroom cottage with a partial ocean view, every unit is fully furnished with a kitchen, A/C, Wi-Fi, and the kind of quiet you came here for.

No. 01 · Flagship Sleeps 4

Hither Cottage

Two bedrooms, partial ocean view, wood-burning fireplace. The largest of our cottages — built for families and reunions.

Reserve
No. 02 · Private Deck Sleeps 2–4

North & South

Classic red cottages with their own private decks. A quiet corner of the property, dressed in maple and rhododendron.

Reserve
No. 03 · East & West Sleeps 2–4

East & West

Sun-facing cottages with full kitchens and sitting areas. Roomy enough for a small family, cozy enough for two.

Reserve
No. 04 · Cozy Sleeps 2

Seaview Cottage

A one-bedroom retreat with a partial ocean view. For couples who want the sound of the ocean in the morning.

Reserve
No. 05 · Studio Sleeps 2

One-Room Efficiency

Compact, well-equipped, and easy on the wallet. Everything you need for a long weekend, nothing you don't.

Reserve
No. 06 · Suite Sleeps 2

Guesthouse Suite

A tucked-away suite available upon request. Wood-paneled, private, and quiet — perfect for travelers who want both privacy and proximity.

Reserve
Evenings on the Hilltop

The Montauk you remember.

This is the Montauk before the club crowd. A camp-style retreat under a stand of maples, a fire pit lit at dusk, gray Adirondack chairs facing the dark. Wood-burning fireplaces inside. A grill on the deck. Daily maid service if you'd like, and pet sitting if you ask.

Beach passes are available for the public stretches. But most guests prefer the short walk down to the private Hither Hill Beach — a quiet ribbon of sand most people drive right past.

What's Included

Everything you need, nothing you don't.

i.

Wood-burning fireplaces

Most cottages have a working fireplace. Off-season weekends were made for them.

ii.

Full efficiency kitchens

Stove, oven, fridge, coffee maker, the works. Cook in or pick up dinner from the village.

iii.

BBQ & outdoor decks

Grills on the cottage decks. Picnic tables on the lawn. A communal fire pit for the evenings.

iv.

Private beach access

A five-minute walk down the hill to Hither Hill Beach — quiet, uncrowded, and almost private.

v.

Pets are family

Dogs welcome in every cottage. Pet sitting is available — just ask. Even Joey and Jesse approve.

vi.

A/C, Wi-Fi, TV with HBO

Quietly modern. We won't make you rough it — unless you want to.

vii.

Daily maid service

Fresh towels and a tidy room every day, for as long as you stay.

viii.

Free parking & beach passes

Plenty of room on-site. Beach parking permits available on request.

"The best deal in Montauk. The grounds are beautiful, the cottages are cozy, and the beach is practically private. Our go-to for fifteen years."

A returning guest · Tripadvisor

Around the Property

A walk through Hither.

Find Us

10 Lincoln Road, Montauk.

A mile from the village. A five-minute walk to the ocean. Fifteen minutes to East Hampton. Five minutes to fishing, golf, tennis, horseback riding, restaurants, and what's left of the nightlife.

Open year-round, by phone or email. Reservations are confirmed by our staff personally — there's a real person on the other end of every booking.
